item.title: Random color picker [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:title: Random color picker [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:author: honeymarie
item.itunes:summary:
Random color picker
(3D Graphics)
Let the Random Color Picker be your guide in exploring the visual spectrum. Embrace its randomness, embrace its versatility, and let the generated colors inspire and elevate your design work, artwork, or any other creative pursuit. With each click, a new color emerges, waiting to captivate and invigorate your visual creations with Wheelgames.
[read more]

item.title: MailsDaddy OST to PST Converter Solution [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: MailsDaddy OST to PST Converter Solution [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mailsdaddysolutions
item.itunes:summary:
MailsDaddy OST to PST Converter Solution
(Utilities)
MailsDaddy OST to PST Converter is an outstanding solution that help users to complete the conversion task without hassle. It allows users to convert multiple OST files into PST format with complete data security. Here users can open and access the complete OST file databases before conversion. The software has the ability to recover highly corrupted OST file databases and export them into PST format. Using this advanced solution users can export unlimited size OST file into PST format.
This solution can easily filter and convert covert some selected OST file databases into PST format. It allows users to export OST files into PST, EML, MSG, MBOX, RTF, Office 365, Live Exchange Server, and others. Users can install this application on all Windows systems. The converted PST file can be easily imported in all Outlook versions.

[read more]

This solution can easily filter and convert covert some selected OST file databases into PST format. It allows users to export OST files into PST, EML, MSG, MBOX, RTF, Office 365, Live Exchange Server, and others. Users can install this application on all Windows systems. The converted PST file can be easily imported in all Outlook versions.

[read more]

The software has the ability to recover highly corrupted OST file databases and export them into PST format. Using this advanced solution users can export unlimited size OST file into PST format.
This solution can easily filter and convert covert some selected OST file databases into PST format. It allows users to export OST files into PST, EML, MSG, MBOX, RTF, Office 365, Live Exchange Server, and others. Users can install this application on all Windows systems. The converted PST file can be easily imported in all Outlook versions.

item.title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK: Unleash the Power of Gaming on Android! Experience the ultimate gaming performance on your Android device with the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK. This powerful and intuitive launcher optimizes your gaming experience, offering enhanced graphics, smooth gameplay, and customizable settings. Elevate your gaming sessions with advanced features such as game boosting, performance optimization, and seamless compatibility with a wide range of popular titles. Download the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK from revWhiteShadow on a gaming adventure like never before!"

[read more]

item.title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.description:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]

item.title: QXGEdit [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QXGEdit [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QXGEdit
(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

[read more]

item.title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.description:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]

item.title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.description:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]

item.title: Shoviv OST to PST Converter tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Shoviv OST to PST Converter tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ostconverter
item.itunes:summary:
Shoviv OST to PST Converter tool
(Utilities)
Shoviv OST File Converter for Windows is a comprehensive software solution designed to facilitate seamless conversion of Outlook OST (Offline Storage Table) files to PST (Personal Storage Table) format. This tool is particularly valuable in scenarios where users need to recover data from inaccessible or corrupted OST files, migrate data between Outlook profiles, or switch to a different email client.
Key Features:

Efficient Conversion: Shoviv OST File Converter ensures a quick and efficient conversion process, allowing users to transform OST files into PST format without data loss.

Selective Item Migration: Users can selectively migrate specific items such as emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, and more, giving them flexibility and control over the conversion process.

Preview Functionality: The software provides a preview feature that enables users to preview the contents of OST files before initiating the conversion, ensuring accuracy and eliminating the risk of unwanted data loss.

Batch Conversion: Shoviv's converter supports batch conversion, allowing users to process multiple OST files simultaneously, saving time and streamlining the conversion workflow.

Maintains Data Integrity: The tool preserves the original folder structure and maintains data integrity throughout the conversion process, ensuring that the converted PST files mirror the structure of the original OST files.

User-Friendly Interface: The software is designed with a user-friendly interface, making it accessible for both novice and experienced users.

Compatibility: Shoviv OST File Converter is compatible with various versions of Windows and supports Outlook 2019, 2016, 2013, and earlier versions.

In summary, Shoviv OST File Converter for Windows is a reliable and feature-rich solution for users seeking a hassle-free and secure way to convert OST files to PST format, providing flexibility, efficiency, and data integrity throughout the process.
[read more]
item.description:
Shoviv OST to PST Converter tool
(Utilities)
Shoviv OST File Converter for Windows is a comprehensive software solution designed to facilitate seamless conversion of Outlook OST (Offline Storage Table) files to PST (Personal Storage Table) format. This tool is particularly valuable in scenarios where users need to recover data from inaccessible or corrupted OST files, migrate data between Outlook profiles, or switch to a different email client.
Key Features:

Efficient Conversion: Shoviv OST File Converter ensures a quick and efficient conversion process, allowing users to transform OST files into PST format without data loss.

Selective Item Migration: Users can selectively migrate specific items such as emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, and more, giving them flexibility and control over the conversion process.

Preview Functionality: The software provides a preview feature that enables users to preview the contents of OST files before initiating the conversion, ensuring accuracy and eliminating the risk of unwanted data loss.

Batch Conversion: Shoviv's converter supports batch conversion, allowing users to process multiple OST files simultaneously, saving time and streamlining the conversion workflow.

Maintains Data Integrity: The tool preserves the original folder structure and maintains data integrity throughout the conversion process, ensuring that the converted PST files mirror the structure of the original OST files.

User-Friendly Interface: The software is designed with a user-friendly interface, making it accessible for both novice and experienced users.

Compatibility: Shoviv OST File Converter is compatible with various versions of Windows and supports Outlook 2019, 2016, 2013, and earlier versions.

In summary, Shoviv OST File Converter for Windows is a reliable and feature-rich solution for users seeking a hassle-free and secure way to convert OST files to PST format, providing flexibility, efficiency, and data integrity throughout the process.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Shoviv OST to PST Converter tool
(Utilities)
Shoviv OST File Converter for Windows is a comprehensive software solution designed to facilitate seamless conversion of Outlook OST (Offline Storage Table) files to PST (Personal Storage Table) format. This tool is particularly valuable in scenarios where users need to recover data from inaccessible or corrupted OST files, migrate data between Outlook profiles, or switch to a different email client.
Key Features:

Efficient Conversion: Shoviv OST File Converter ensures a quick and efficient conversion process, allowing users to transform OST files into PST format without data loss.

Selective Item Migration: Users can selectively migrate specific items such as emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, and more, giving them flexibility and control over the conversion process.

Preview Functionality: The software provides a preview feature that enables users to preview the contents of OST files before initiating the conversion, ensuring accuracy and eliminating the risk of unwanted data loss.

Batch Conversion: Shoviv's converter supports batch conversion, allowing users to process multiple OST files simultaneously, saving time and streamlining the conversion workflow.

Maintains Data Integrity: The tool preserves the original folder structure and maintains data integrity throughout the conversion process, ensuring that the converted PST files mirror the structure of the original OST files.

User-Friendly Interface: The software is designed with a user-friendly interface, making it accessible for both novice and experienced users.

Compatibility: Shoviv OST File Converter is compatible with various versions of Windows and supports Outlook 2019, 2016, 2013, and earlier versions.

In summary, Shoviv OST File Converter for Windows is a reliable and feature-rich solution for users seeking a hassle-free and secure way to convert OST files to PST format, providing flexibility, efficiency, and data integrity throughout the process.
[read more]
